headline: Aker Solutions ASA: Aker Solutions proposes NOK 5.00 extraordinary dividend
summary: The board of directors of Aker Solutions ASA ("Aker Solutions") has proposed an extraordinary cash dividend of NOK 5.00 per share, subject to approval at the Annual General Meeting (AGM) to be held on April 16, 2026.

headline: One of These Oil Services Stocks Is Pulling Away From the Pack: Baker Hughes, Haliburton, SLB
summary: Benchmark West Texas Intermediate crude oil surged from $55.44 a barrel in mid-December 2025 to $94.65 as of March 9, and the oil services sector is moving with it. On Tuesday, Baker Hughes (NASDAQ: BKR), Halliburton (NYSE: HAL), and SLB (NYSE: SLB) (formerly Schlumberger) all traded sharply higher, with the VanEck Oil Services ETF (NYSEARCA: ...
